name: PAX Mini Grip Sleeve
summary: Enhance the safety of your PAX Mini with the addition of a secure and snug silicone sleeve.
description: Enhance the safety of your PAX Mini with the addition of a secure and snug silicone sleeve. Experience increased comfort and grip with this limited availability accessory. Designed specifically for PAX Mini. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience using the product. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
